---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request / 功能建议"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PhotoSense / 为 PhotoSense 提出新功能或改进建议
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: Gara-11

---

## 💡 Feature Summary / 功能概述

Please briefly describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

请简要描述你希望 PhotoSense 增加或改进的功能。

---

## 🎯 Problem or Use Case / 问题或使用场景

What problem would this feature solve?

这个功能主要希望解决什么问题？

Please describe the workflow or situation where this feature would be useful.

请描述这个功能适用的实际工作流程或使用场景。

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe how you think this feature should work.

请描述你希望这个功能如何实现或如何操作。

---

## 🎨 Related Workflow / 相关工作流

Which part of PhotoSense is this feature related to?

这个功能主要涉及 PhotoSense 的哪个部分？

- [ ] Photoshop Integration / Photoshop 集成
- [ ] Automatic Selection / 自动选区
- [ ] Mask Editor / 蒙版编辑
- [ ] GPT Image 2
- [ ] Nano Banana / Gemini
- [ ] API Configuration / API 配置
- [ ] Transparent Patch / 透明补丁
- [ ] Real-ESRGAN
- [ ] UI / UX / 界面与交互
- [ ] Performance / 性能
- [ ] Other / 其他

---

## 🤖 AI Backend / AI 后端

Is this request related to a specific AI backend?

这个建议是否与特定 AI 后端有关？

- [ ] GPT Image 2
- [ ] Nano Banana / Gemini
- [ ] Third-party compatible API / 第三方兼容 API
- [ ] Real-ESRGAN
- [ ] All / 所有
- [ ] Not related / 无关

---

## 🖼️ References / 参考资料

You may attach screenshots, mockups, examples, or other references.

可以附上截图、界面草图、案例或其他参考资料。

---

## 📝 Additional Information / 补充说明

Add anything else that may help explain your idea.

请补充任何有助于理解该功能建议的信息。
